breaks.description: FX rate source mismatch between source and target data
breaks.root_cause: Source and target systems are using different FX rate sources, leading to inconsistent notional valuations
breaks.recommended_action: Align FX rate sources between source and target systems to ensure consistent notional calculations

breaks.description: Counterparty LEIs present in source but missing in target
breaks.root_cause: Counterparty reference data synchronization lag between source and target systems
breaks.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the counterparty reference data synchronization issue between source and target

breaks.description: Positions silently excluded by ingestion filters in target system
breaks.root_cause: Target system is applying silent ingestion filters, leading to data loss without audit trail
breaks.recommended_action: Review and optimize the ingestion filter configuration in the target system to ensure transparent data processing
